recentCommits.author: dizzzable
recentCommits.subject: Fix restore user relinking for v1.2.7

capabilityGaps.title: Company-owned AltShop Remnawave and payment integrations skill
capabilityGaps.evidence: ALT-29 is the only remaining project todo and packages Remnawave plus gateway knowledge for other lanes.

capabilityGaps.title: Frontend browser verification harness for slow, offline, and locale-specific states
capabilityGaps.evidence: ALT-4 closed with a residual note that the web app still lacks dedicated frontend verification for those states.

capabilityGaps.title: MulenPay production webhook_secret rollout note
capabilityGaps.evidence: ALT-31 now requires an app-owned `webhook_secret` before MulenPay webhooks can be safely accepted in production.

reportingGaps: Paperclip issues do not have first-class commit linkage, so issue-to-file attribution still depends on authored comments and git proximity.
Completion-comment quality is inconsistent: ALT-31, ALT-32, ALT-34, ALT-14, and ALT-4 contain structured evidence, while ALT-15 currently does not.
The current working tree is still dirty, which exposes line-range evidence for live rework but not merged commit boundaries for each task.

followUpTasks.title: Add issue-to-commit provenance capture to the execution pipeline
followUpTasks.evidence: The dashboard can show commit history and issue history, but it still has to correlate them manually.

followUpTasks.title: Standardize completion comments with changed paths, commands, and test evidence
followUpTasks.evidence: ALT-15 currently lacks the structured handoff shape already used in ALT-31, ALT-32, ALT-34, and ALT-14.

followUpTasks.title: Finish and sync the AltShop integrations skill rollout
followUpTasks.evidence: ALT-29 is still open, and it directly reduces future reporting ambiguity around Remnawave and payment-lane work.
